contents:
This project was funded by HUAWEI.
The characteristics of the traffic system are dynamic and complicated. Traditional traffic simulation software can imitate the behavior of traffic participants, but it is a far cry from reality. By interacting with the environment, agents can acquire knowledge or enhance their performance via reinforcement learning techniques. According to the agent’s predetermined objectives, in a specific environment and under a specific policy, specific actions are performed and incentives are acquired. Unlike traditional algorithms that rely on mathematical models, agent-based methods using reinforcement learning do not require prior information. In addition, it has excellent self-learning and self-adaptability for complex systems, and it can adapt its control strategy to system changes to satisfy the demands of dynamic and complicated traffic systems. By setting a realistic reward function, research on the traffic multi-agent simulation technology based on reinforcement learning enables ongoing interaction learning between the agent and the environment. Construct a multi-agent traffic simulation platform to generate novel solutions for urban traffic challenges and to optimize traffic management techniques.
In this project, my job includes
 Investigating the application of reinforcement learning in transportation and write a literature review. Coding a reinforcement learning algorithm in mode choice. Completinig the clustering work for large-scale decentralized decision making in transportation simulation.
title: Multi-Agent Simulation Based on Reinforcement Learning

contents:
This project was funded by Wuhan Traffic Management Bureau.
This research attempts to use the burgeoning big data technologies to investigate the urban transportation system based on digital twins. It solves the disadvantages of conventional approaches, such as limited data support and poor analytical precision, and speeds the integration of essential technologies, such as artificial intelligence, with transportation-specific knowledge.
The purpose of this project is mainly the following three points. Initially, the value of traffic data may be increased by fusing and mining vast amount of data. Secondly, construct a digital twin system to facilitate the automated development of complicated road networks. In the end, accurate repair and development of the visual output of the urban transportation system.
In this project, my job includes
 Building up a multi-modal transportation road network in the simulation software SUMO, including the basic network, bus stops, parking lots, and traffic lights. Verifying the authenticity of the simulation, such as comparing the bus lines or the passing time of each phase of the traffic lights between reality and simulation.
title: Intelligent Transportation Network Driven by Digital Twin

contents:
This project was funded by School of Transportation in Southeast University.
Multiple causes, including the People’s Hospital, contribute to severe traffic congestion in the Qingliang Mountain area of Gulou District in Nanjing. Consider using the underground area to construct a subway station and conduct a simulation-based traffic impact study. What type of crowd-gathering impact would the subway station be designed to create? What effect would a set of schemes, such as addresses, have on the road network after they are specified?
In this project, my job includes
 Build a simulation scene in Anylogic through 3D drawings of Qingliangshan subway station. Simulate the flow of people in the subway station and the pedestrian flow around the subway station in Anylogic.
title: Nanjing Qingliang Mountain Underground Space Simulation

contents:
This project was funded by Yangzhou Road Management Department.
The intelligent traffic visualization application with large-scale data statistics and integration is the centralized statistics and display of data for each highway management platform subsystem. It may also increase the quality of expressway service, the quality of highway service, the stability of expressway traffic operation, and the dependability of the road network under adverse weather conditions. Future requirements for the rapid expansion of roadways can be met by an integrated application of intelligent traffic visualization with rich data content and intuitive display.
In this project, my job includes
 Designing the functions of the platform and divide it into flow management system, bridge maintenance system and road maintenance system. Visualizing data in each system using JavaScript.
title: Traffic Visualization Integrated Application System

contents: Our team went into overtime in the college basketball game and won!
title: A Memorable Basketball Game

contents:
This project was funded by BOYUXIN.
Digital twin is a significant direction and application scenario for the development of informatization in the transportation, as well as a key visualization technique for smart city. The digital twin’s technical advantages include digital identification, simultaneous visualization, virtual-real interaction, and intelligent control, and it will bring new solutions and avenues for intelligent parking management and intelligent driving.
In this project, my job includes
 Building up the parking lots on the SUMO simulation platform. Providing and visualize the information of parking occupancy in real-time.
title: Suzhou Ancient City Digital Twin Platform

contents: We eventually won one after four rounds of football. Everyone burst out laughing.
title: The Only Victory

contents: I cycled around the beautiful Qinghai Lake for four days and uploaded the video to bilibili.
title: Cycling around Qinghai Lake

contents:
This file exists solely to respond to /search URL with the related search layout template.
No content shown here is rendered, all content is based in the template layouts/page/search.html
Setting a very low sitemap priority will tell search engines this is not important content.
This implementation uses Fusejs, jquery and mark.js
Initial setup Search depends on additional output content type of JSON in config.toml
[outputs] home = ["HTML", "JSON"] Searching additional fileds To search additional fields defined in front matter, you must add it in 2 places.
Edit layouts/_default/index.JSON This exposes the values in /index.json i.e. add category
... "contents":{{ .Content | plainify | jsonify }} {{ if .Params.tags }}, "tags":{{ .Params.tags | jsonify }}{{end}}, "categories" : {{ .Params.categories | jsonify }}, ... Edit fuse.js options to Search static/js/search.js
keys: [ "title", "contents", "tags", "categories" ]
title: Search Results
